source.description: Built-in image generation contact sheet reviewed before cropping; approved final panel is saved as the finished raster artwork.
source.notes: All step frames should be cropped from the same generated contact sheet so the dog head, ears, paws, desk edge, pencil cup, graphite texture, and restrained color stay consistent.

process_strategy: Use one six-panel contact sheet that builds a small dog peeking over a desk from simple head and desk guides to ears, muzzle, paws, pencil cup, restrained color, and final keeper-line strength.

final_elements.name: round dog head
final_elements.description: A friendly dog head peeking above a horizontal desk edge.

final_elements.name: desk edge
final_elements.description: A simple horizontal desktop line in front of the dog.

final_elements.name: floppy ears
final_elements.description: Two soft floppy ears attached to the sides of the dog head.

final_elements.name: muzzle and face
final_elements.description: A rounded muzzle with simple eyes, nose, and small mouth.

final_elements.name: front paws
final_elements.description: Two small paws resting on the front edge of the desk.

final_elements.name: pencil cup
final_elements.description: A small cup with two or three pencils sitting on the desk.

final_elements.name: restrained warm shading
final_elements.description: Light brown and yellow colored-pencil touches on the dog and pencils.

frames.visible_job: Sets the round dog head guide above a simple desk-edge line.
Adds both floppy ears while keeping the head and desk placement unchanged.
Adds the muzzle, eyes, nose, and mouth inside the existing head shape.

frames.step_name: Set the paws on the desk
frames.visible_job: Adds two small front paws overlapping the front desk edge.
Adds the pencil cup, pencil shapes, and restrained warm color on existing dog and desk elements.

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens existing dog, desk, paw, pencil cup, pencil, and warm shading marks without adding new office props.
allowed_changes: paper texture from the saved contact sheet

rejection_checks: No ear, muzzle, eye, nose, paw, pencil cup, pencil, desk edge, or core color choice should first appear in the final image.
The dog must keep the same front-facing pose, scale, and placement in every frame.
The final image must not add computer screens, lettering, extra office supplies, humans, or background scenery absent from the process frames.
Do not use separately prompted step images that drift from this contact sheet.
